title: Microsoft's EU Monopoly: Why Claude ISN'T on Teams! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses why Claude is not integrated into Microsoft Teams, attributing it to Microsoft's strong EU market position and their competing Copilot AI product. The video raises questions about potential anticompetitive dynamics in the enterprise AI space.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that Claude is absent from Microsoft Teams because of Microsoft's strong EU market position and its competing Copilot AI product. It frames the situation as a question of potential anticompetitive dynamics in enterprise AI, where a dominant platform owner also ships its own assistant. The takeaway: vertical integration and market power may shape which third-party AI tools reach users inside widely used enterprise software.
